summary.shape_sentence: Bearish trend day from the open into early afternoon, followed by a controlled afternoon reclaim that failed below the morning breakdown zone.

goat.note: Strongest continuation leg was the lunch-hour flush into the session low near 25020.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivot behavior dominated the morning and lunch session through repeated lower highs and failed bounces.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots became effective only after the early-PM flush, forming a higher-low reclaim structure.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 25290-25330 capped the afternoon rally and was respected into the close.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 25020-25050 held the LOD and launched the afternoon recovery attempt.

time_markers.10am_blue: Bearish drive already active below the open after the early high failed.
time_markers.12pm_red: Weak continuation state, pressing toward the final lunch-hour flush.
time_markers.2pm_green: Post-LOD higher-low behavior forming; buyers beginning the afternoon reclaim.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Close faded from the afternoon high and settled below reclaimed supply, still bearish versus the open.

takeaway: Bearish trend day with a lunch-hour capitulation low and afternoon reclaim attempt; early high failure led to sustained downside, then demand held near LOD before supply rejected the late rally.
